title: Fines & Bounties Paid
query: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PayFines WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PayBounties WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate) AS count, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(Amount) FROM PayFines WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate), 0) + COALESCE((SELECT SUM(Amount) FROM PayBounties WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate), 0) AS totalReward

details.text: {count} payment(s) · {totalReward} Cr paid to clear record
details.help: Fines paid at an Interstellar Factors or station, plus bounties cleared
